response.global_analysis: Confirmed the audio phonetically matches the provided JSON lyrics for 'Ai Ai Ai Ai ♡ Ai Love You'. The subtitles cover the active vocal segment at the start of the video (00:00.000 - 00:08.962). The remainder of the promotional video features instrumental music over scrolling fan messages, followed by a silent sponsor screen; in accordance with the Golden Rule requiring vocal audio to drive timing, no subtitles are generated for these non-vocal sections.
